title: AI Bubble Monitoring
subtitle: When everyone is talking about AI, we calculate what it is worth.

story.title: Valuation Story
story.content: Current AI sector valuations have surpassed the 2021 pandemic bubble but have not yet reached the 2000 dot-com peak. The difference: today's AI companies have real revenue, but whether growth can support valuations is questionable. Nasdaq 100 P/S has reached 6.5x, far exceeding the 2000 peak of 4.5x.
